name: Royal Care Intimate Wipes 10 Pack
shortDescription: Royal care feminine wipes are specially curated for women with sky-high standards we make sexual wellness products with you in mind with no mystery ingredients.
description: Royal care feminine wipes are specially curated for women with sky-high standards we make sexual wellness products with you in mind with no mystery ingredients. Our All-Natural Cleansing Wipes Are Safe to Use Anywhere (Literally Anywhere) On Your Body. Our Wipes Are Hypoallergenic, Vegan, Approved by Gynecologists and Made Without Alcohol, Parabens, Or Sulfates. We Love Mother Nature! So, We Strive to Make Royal Care Wipes with The Cleanest Ingredients That Nature Provides, While Also Choosing a Biodegradable Wipe Material. Dermatologically Tested Our all-natural cleansing wipes are safe to use anywhere (literally anywhere) on your body. Our wipes are hypoallergenic, vegan, approved by gynecologists, and made without alcohol, parabens, or sulfates. We love Mother Nature! So, we strive to make Royal care wipes with the cleanest ingredients that nature provides, while also choosing a biodegradable wipe material. Uses Of Feminine Cleansing Wipes Personal Hygiene Royal Care Intimate wipes are primarily used for cleaning the external genital area, including the vulva and perineum. Menstrual Care Royal Care Intimate wipes can be used during menstruation to clean the genital area when changing sanitary products. Post-Intercourse After sexual activity, intimate wipes can be used to freshen up and maintain cleanliness. This can help reduce the risk of irritation or infection. Skin Sensitivity Intimate wipes that are formulated with gentle ingredients can be used by individuals with sensitive skin to avoid irritation.
